rationale: Title X is more precise and transparent, explicitly naming the retrospective design and using unambiguous language, whereas Title Y's compressed 'Implant Outcomes' phrasing is slightly awkward and omitting 'Retrospective' reduces methodological transparency.
loser_weakness: Title Y's noun-stacking in 'Implant Outcomes' is grammatically awkward, and dropping 'Retrospective' from the study design descriptor reduces informational completeness without meaningful gain in concision.
